# VasAccounting

Entry map for the `vas-accounting` module, including web UI routes, API routes, and the large finance controller surface.

## Verified paths

### Routes

- [Modules/VasAccounting/Routes/web.php](../../Modules/VasAccounting/Routes/web.php) — `/vas-accounting/*` web routes for setup, vouchers, treasury, invoices, reports, integrations, closing, cutover, and more
- [Modules/VasAccounting/Routes/api.php](../../Modules/VasAccounting/Routes/api.php) — `/vas-accounting/*` API routes for health, domains, posting previews, finance documents, treasury reconciliation, and provider webhooks
